description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring a plush, padded appearance with horizontal channeling along the sides and back. The sofa is adorned with five loose cushions in varying shades of blue and gray, including two plaid-patterned square cushions and a single round cushion for added visual interest. The armrests are thick, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and providing a cohesive, boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, metallic legs with a gold finish, slightly angled outward for stability and a touch of elegance. The seat is a single, wide cushion, offering a smooth and uninterrupted sitting surface. Overall, the design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A contemporary light gray sofa with plush channeling, five assorted blue and gray cushions, and gold-finished metal legs. The design is boxy, padded, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the layered channeling detail, with cushions stacked along the back.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the sofa, all five cushions, and the single, wide seat cushion with gold legs visible at the corners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and channeling details, with a clear look at the cushion arrangement from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the continuous, smooth backrest and the subtle channeling, with the tops of the cushions peeking above.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose cushions: three square (two plaid, one solid), one round, and one rectangular, all placed along the backrest; single wide seat cushion, all cushions are varied in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with horizontal channeling and a boxy profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, outward-angled metal legs with a gold finish, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed under the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with horizontal channeling and no visible tufting; topped with loose cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with visible horizontal channeling on the sides and back; cushions include both solid and plaid patterns.
